mano_cua.result_summary: 堆叠柱状图中值为0的segment显示height=1.7px的残留细线，而非完全不可见。DevTools查询确认：值为0的rect元素height='1.7'(如Tue DS1=0→h:1.7, Thu DS1=0→h:1.7, Mon DS2=0→h:1.7)。源码MIN_BAR_PERCENT_HEIGHT=0.01导致0值也获得最小高度。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Console query of all 15 bar rect elements confirmed: zero-value bars have height=1.7px instead of 0, creating visible thin lines at the baseline.

deploy_notes.workaround: Created custom test-stacked.html with IIFE build, served via npx serve
